summary: Iteration 74 - Multiple ASR Solar CRM Fixes Testing Complete. All backend APIs working correctly. Fixed SmartWhatsAppButton.js to use correct WhatsApp number 8298389097.
critical_code_review_comments: SmartWhatsAppButton.js had wrong WhatsApp number 919296389097 - FIXED to 918298389097
Note: 9296389097 is still used for tel: links (Call buttons) which is correct as it's the phone number, not WhatsApp number
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified: 1) New Leads API returns WhatsApp leads by default - WORKING, 2) 24hr auto-cleanup endpoint exists - WORKING, 3) Bulk conversation delete endpoint exists - WORKING, 4) Gallery tabs renamed to 'Facebook Posts', 'Latest Installation Work', 'Uploads' - VERIFIED, 5) Get Started Today section has no Call button - VERIFIED, 6) www.asrenterprises.in shown on page - VERIFIED, 7) All wa.me links use 918298389097 - VERIFIED after fix
